name: whatsapp
description: WhatsApp Business API integration for messaging, contact management, and business communication

whatsapp_business.description: WhatsApp Business API Access Token with phone number ID

additional_config.phone_number_id: Required: Your WhatsApp Business Phone Number ID
additional_config.business_account_id: Required: Your WhatsApp Business Account ID for management functions
additional_config.webhook_verify_token: Optional: Custom webhook verification token for future webhook support

prerequisites: Facebook App with WhatsApp Business API enabled
steps: Create a Meta Developer account at developers.facebook.com
Create a new app or use existing app
Add WhatsApp Business API product to your app
Set up webhook endpoints for real-time updates
Test your integration with sandbox environment

security_notes: Access tokens should be kept secure and not exposed in client-side code
Webhook endpoints should be HTTPS and properly secured
Rate limits should be respected to avoid API restrictions
Message templates must be pre-approved by Meta for business use
Personal phone numbers cannot be used for business messaging
